nasb.text: When the king of Moab saw that the battle was too fierce for him, he took with him 700 men who drew swords, to break through to the king of Edom; but they could not.

esv.text: When the king of Moab saw that the battle was going against him, he took with him 700 swordsmen to break through, opposite the king of Edom, but they could not.

cnv.text: 摩押王見戰事激烈，無法抵抗，於是帶領七百持刀的兵，想要突圍到以東王那裡，可是不成功，

ccb.text: 摩押王见战事不利，就率领七百名刀兵，企图从以东王那边突围，但没有成功。
